summary.en: Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years building microservices and backend systems in fintech and enterprise domains. Works mainly in .NET Core, Golang, and cloud platforms (Azure, Oracle Cloud, Kubernetes); CKAD-certified and test-driven. Runs the Coding Afternoon tech blog and has spoken twice at GDG Kaohsiung.

description.en: CI/CD automation, reproducible test environments, team workshops (TDD, Docker/K8s).
Coding Afternoon blog built and run solo — content, site, and subscription automation.
CKAD-certified; ELK observability on Kubernetes; legacy refactoring.

details.en: Tech-education blog (coding-afternoon.com), built and run solo.

achievements.en: Operate the platform end to end: content, site, and an automated subscription flow
Authored three 30-day technical series (Golang design patterns, TDD with AI, blockchain) and the open-source EccSDK NuGet package

details.en: Asia-region service integration for a global vehicle-care platform, using .NET Core.

achievements.en: Built cross-regional .NET Core services supporting Asia-market business operations

details.en: Migrated a credit-loan platform to microservices; set up cloud infrastructure on Oracle Cloud.

achievements.en: Migrated the credit loan system from a monolith to microservices
Redesigned the strategy module to separate business rules from loan-processing logic
Implemented SSO/OAuth authentication shared across internal services
Automated CI/CD with Azure DevOps and deployed production services on Oracle Cloud (OCI)
Set up test environments (OracleDB, Redis, identity services) for local verification

details.en: Developed payment processing and third-party API integrations, with TDD and hexagonal architecture.

achievements.en: Led the intern team as Scrum Master; ran workshops on hexagonal architecture, TDD, and refactoring
Hosted Docker and Kubernetes workshops for the team
Built ELK monitoring for Kubernetes services
Refactored legacy code and fixed bugs that had persisted for over two years
Spoke twice at GDG Kaohsiung (Golang, developer tooling)
